title: Compound V
description: Adds Compound V from The Boys with lots of Superpowers!
body:
Compound V adds the titular Compound V and its temporary version, Temp V, from The Boys. Taking Compound V will grant you a random power. Some powers are passive, while others can be activated with the V key (rebindable). All Compound V powers give you a baseline damage reduction and strength boost. On rare occasion, however, negative effects may be applied. It is important to note that milk cannot cure Compound V. Compound V and Temp V can be found rarely in many different places across your world, including end cities, bastions, and ancient cities.  Features an in-depth configuration, controlling which powers are available to obtain, their chances of being given to you, the chance of getting a bad effect, where you can find Compound V, and more. Addon creation is easy with the system I have created for this mod, meaning you can add your own compound V effects that will be given a chance to be granted with the rest of the effects.   Current Power List (Spoilers for the mod's features):
Spoiler
  • Basic Strength and Durability
  • Laser Eyes (With and without flight)
  • Speed
  • Water Powers (Like The Deep)
  • Invisibility
  • Projectile Explosion (Like Rex-Splode from Invincible)
  • Energy Absorption (Like Powerplex from Invincible)
  • Teleportation
  • Vision Boost
  • Enhanced Regeneration
  • Creative Flight
  • Levitation (Toggleable)
  • Sonic Boom (Warden)
  • Density Manipulation
  • Total Invincibility
  • Projectile Immunity
  • Berserker
  • Mind Control
  • Instakill
  • Star Power
  • Soldier Boy Chest Blast
  • If Pehkui is installed:
    • Shrink
    • Enlarge

Negative Effects:

  • Weakness/Slowness
  • Infinite Levitation
  • Random Teleportation
  • Magnetism
  • Blindness
